texto: Does this mean that religious consumption will increase online? That could be. We do not know yet, but to expect religion to disappear because of online technology is like expecting people to stop listening to music because Napster, Spotify and Wimp are offering us all the music we want online
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Torkel Brekke: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a fe. O trecho “Does this mean that religious consumption will increase online? That could be. We do not know yet…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que fe, internet, online pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de online e religion.
